DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Off Calendar

Defendant Ford Motor Company'S Joinder In Defendant Tosco Refining Company, Inc.'S Motion For Change Of Venue. Transferred To Dept. 301. Judge Woolard Recuses Herself.
Off Calendar Dec-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LARRY SAGER OF LANKFORD & CRAWFORD LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 258-9091 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY;
